hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_/.-])(npm|npx|pnpm|yarn)([[:space:]]|$)'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Use bun/bunx for this project — npm/npx/pnpm/yarn are blocked."}}'; fi
